info.title: Crevio API
info.description:
API for the Crevio creator platform — a multi-tenant SaaS for digital product sales.
Uses snake_case keys following Stripe conventions. All resource IDs are string prefix IDs (e.g., "prod_abc123").

get.description: Returns information about the authenticated account
Returns a list of products for the current account. Supports filtering by status and searching by name.
Returns detailed information about a specific product

delete.description: Deletes a product. Only products with no orders and no Stripe product ID can be deleted.

post.description:
Returns 402 with payment requirements, or grants access on valid x402 payment.
Pass a price_variant query param to select a specific variant, otherwise the first visible variant is used.

parameters.name: price_variant
parameters.description: Price variant prefix ID to use for payment

200.description: Access granted after valid x402 payment

402.description: Payment required — includes x402 payment requirements in response headers

get.description: Returns all price variants for the current account. Optionally filter by product.

post.description: Creates a new price variant for a product

get.description: Returns a specific price variant

patch.description: Updates an existing price variant. Set archived to true to archive it.

get.description: Returns reviews for products in the current account
Returns a specific review

post.description: Creates a new checkout session for purchasing products

get.description: Returns a specific checkout session
Returns a specific cart
Returns a list of orders for the current account

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated relations to expand: customer, line_items

get.description: Returns a specific order

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated relations to expand: customer, line_items

get.description: Returns details of a specific order item

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated relations to expand: order, price_variant, product

get.description: Returns a list of customers for the current account
Returns a specific customer
Returns a list of discounts for the current account
Returns a specific discount
Returns a list of checkout links for the current account

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated relations to expand: discount, price_variants

post.description: Creates a new shareable checkout link

get.description: Returns a specific checkout link

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated relations to expand: discount, price_variants

get.description: Returns a list of experiences for the current account

parameters.name: item_type
parameters.description: Filter by experience type (e.g., Community, Course, Download)

get.description: Returns a specific experience
Returns a list of published blog posts
Returns a specific published blog post
Returns a list of webhook endpoints for the current account

post.description: Creates a new webhook endpoint. The secret is only returned on creation.

get.description: Returns a list of all available event types that can be subscribed to
Returns a specific webhook endpoint

post.description: Sends a test event to the webhook endpoint

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description: The event type to send as a test

get.description: Returns a list of invoices for the current account

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated relations to expand: customer, price_variant, order

post.description: Creates a new invoice and sends it to the customer via email

get.description: Returns a specific invoice

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated relations to expand: customer, price_variant, order

post.description: Voids an open invoice. Cannot void paid invoices.

400.description: Invoice cannot be voided (already void or paid)

post.description: Creates a checkout session for the invoice and returns the checkout with a Stripe client secret for completing payment

201.description: Checkout session created for invoice payment

get.description: Returns a list of customer subscriptions for the current account
Returns a specific subscription

post.description: Cancels a subscription. Metered and past-due subscriptions are canceled immediately. Others cancel at the end of the current billing period.
Resumes a paused or canceled subscription

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile data including their roles in the current account
Returns a list of files for the current account. Supports filtering by source_type.

post.description:
Create a new file record. For uploads, only a filename is required — a presigned URL is returned for direct upload to S3. For external URLs (YouTube, Vimeo, Wistia), pass source_type "external" with a url.

**Upload flow:**
1. Call this endpoint with `{"file": {"filename": "photo.png"}}`
2. PUT your file binary to the returned `upload_url` with the provided `upload_headers`
3. Call `POST /v1/files/{id}/uploaded` to confirm the upload and transition to `ready`

filename.description: The name of the file including its extension (e.g., "photo.png"). Required for uploads.

source_type.description: Type of file. Defaults to "upload" if omitted.

url.description: URL for external media (YouTube, Vimeo, Wistia). Required when source_type is "external".

get.description: Returns a single file by its prefix ID

delete.description: Deletes a file and its associated storage object

get.description: Returns the x402 payment configuration for the current account

ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key in the format: Bearer {api_token}

StartingAfter.name: starting_after
StartingAfter.description: Cursor for pagination — the prefix ID of the last item in the previous page

source_type.description: Whether the file was uploaded or is an external URL

upload_status.description: Current upload status. Uploads start as "pending" until confirmed via /uploaded.

size.description: File size in bytes. Null while upload_status is "pending".

provider.description: Detected provider for external URLs (youtube, vimeo, wistia)

file_url.description: CDN URL for accessing the uploaded file

upload_url.description: Presigned URL to PUT the file binary to. Only present for upload source_type.

upload_headers.description: Headers to include when uploading to the presigned URL

roles.description: User's roles in the current account (e.g., owner, admin, member)

price_variants.description: Always included — visible, non-archived variants ordered by position

revoke_after_days.description: Days after which access is revoked

client_secret.description: Stripe client secret for completing payment

order.description: Order prefix ID by default. When expand=order, returns a full Order object.

price_variant.description: Price variant prefix ID by default. When expand=price_variant, returns a full PriceVariant object.

product.description: Product prefix ID by default. When expand=product, returns a full Product object.

customer.description: Customer prefix ID by default. When expand=customer, returns a full Customer object.

ends_at.description: Set when subscription is canceled (cancellation effective date)

customer.description: Customer prefix ID by default. When expand=customer, returns a full Customer object.

price_variant.description: Price variant prefix ID by default. When expand=price_variant, returns a full PriceVariant object.

order.description: Order prefix ID by default. When expand=order, returns a full Order object. Only present when invoice is paid.

discount.description: Discount prefix ID by default. When expand=discount, returns a full Discount object.

WebhookEndpointWithSecret.description: Returned only on creation — includes the signing secret

email.description: Customer email — creates or finds a customer

_destroy.description: Set to true to remove item

amount_off.description: Discount amount in cents (required if discount_type=amount_off)

price_variants.description: Limit discount to specific price variant prefix IDs

customer.description: Existing customer prefix ID (provide this OR customer_name + email_address)

customer_name.description: Customer name (required if no customer prefix ID)

email_address.description: Customer email (required if no customer prefix ID)

due_at.description: Payment due date (must be in the future)

charge_buyer_fee.description: Whether the buyer pays the platform fee

body_html.description: HTML body content for the product page

slug.description: URL slug (auto-generated from name if not provided)

revoke_after_days.description: Days after which access is revoked

waitlist.description: Whether to enable waitlist when sold out

archived.description: Set to true to archive the price variant

error.message: You did not provide an API key.
The requested resource was not found

tags.name: Invoices
tags.description: Invoice creation, payment, and lifecycle management

tags.name: Files
tags.description: File uploads and external media management
